positive: Minimalist line art illustration of a majestic forest animal (e.g., stag or fox) standing majestically amidst stylized geometric foliage. The composition should feature a central, clean silhouette with strong, contrasting lines. Use a limited color palette of deep emerald green, warm gold, and earthy terracotta. The style should be modern folk art mixed with elegant Scandinavian design, emphasizing clean edges, bold black outlines, and negative space. Ideal for high-quality screen printing on apparel. Full-body view, perfect symmetry, high contrast, vector style, flat illustration.
